title: DEWALT 18V XR Brushless 125mm Angle Grinder - Tool Only, DCG407N-XJ
description: DEWALT 18V XR Brushless 125mm Angle Grinder - Tool Only, DCG407N-XJ
features: SUPERIOR POWER AND UNMATCHED PERFORMANCE: Its 18V brushless motor provides enhanced efficiency and durability, longer lifespan, and reduced maintenance compared to brushed motors.

ELECTRONIC CLUTCH: Reduces the kickback reaction in the event of a pinch or stall, minimizing the risk of injury and potential damage to the workpiece. Experience superior control and confidence, especially during demanding cutting and grinding tasks.

MESH DEBRIS COVERS: Restrict dust being sucked through the motor. These covers help maintain optimal airflow and cooling, reducing the risk of overheating and extending the lifespan of the motor. Particularly beneficial in dusty environments, ensuring reliable operation and minimizing maintenance needs.
ERGONOMIC: Designed with a rubber overmould for enhanced grip and comfort. It reduces fatigue during prolongued use while also ensuring toughness and great control.

VERSATILE: Equipped with a side handle that can be positioned in two different locations, providing greater comfort and control for the user. This versatility allows for optimal handling and stability during various cutting and grinding tasks, accommodating different user preferences and work conditions.
breadCrumbs: DIY & Tools > Power, Garden & Hand Tools > Power Tools > Grinders > Angle Grinders
